findings.location: s5 — 常駐バッチのテスト用ハンドラ構成
findings.description: The production configuration XML code block is omitted. The fully qualified class name `nablarch.fw.handler.RequestThreadLoopHandler` appears only in that code block and is absent from the knowledge file. The knowledge file shows only the test-side replacement (`nablarch.test.OneShotLoopHandler`) in the code example, leaving the production handler's package undocumented.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains two code blocks: (1) production config with `class="nablarch.fw.handler.RequestThreadLoopHandler"` and (2) test config with `class="nablarch.test.OneShotLoopHandler"`. Knowledge file includes only the test config block.
